package.name: sensor_models
package.description:
Reusable xacro sensor macros for Gazebo simulation.
Two macros for the Unitree L1 LiDAR: l1_lidar — Gazebo Fortress (Ignition Gazebo 6, ROS 2 Humble) Uses gpu_lidar sensor type, ignition_frame_id. Interface: parent, prefix, *origin (block). l1_lidar_gazebo — Gazebo Classic (Gazebo 11) — legacy robot_sim pipeline. Uses gpu_ray + libgazebo_ros_ray_sensor.
Add new macros here when porting to additional robot platforms.
